description: Travel an ordered list of waypoints, advancing on arrival; loops or stops at the end. Sets velocity for a following velocity integrator. Records a monotonic __pathProgress (cumulative distance) so other parts can rank movers by how far along the path they are (e.g. ai-aim-and-fire 'first' targeting).

points.description: Array of { x, y } waypoints (structural geometry).

arriveRadius.description: Distance at which a waypoint is reached (structural).

loop.description: Restart from the first point at the end.
